content: The multi-perspective inconsistency sampling at the core of modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be embedded into the task-agnostic iterative feedback loop of Self-Refine to create a stronger self-improving framework that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data. This hybrid approach resolves a core limitation of vanilla Self-Refine, which often gets stuck in local feedback loops where the model repeats its own unrecognized mistakes.
